connectwise.keyUnchanged: Leave blank to keep current key

connectwise.autoTicketVoicemailsHint: Automatically create a ticket when a voicemail is left.

connectwise.companyMappingsDescription: Map PBX extensions and DIDs to ConnectWise companies for automatic ticket routing.
